host_video.description: Start video when the host joins the meeting.

participant_video.description: Start video when participants join the meeting.

join_before_host.description: Allow participants to join before the host.

jbh_time.description: Minutes before the host joins that participants can join. 0 - any time, 5 - 5 minutes, 10 - 10 minutes.

watermark.description: Add watermark when viewing a shared screen.

use_pmi.description: Use Personal Meeting ID instead of generated meeting ID.

approval_type.description: Registration approval type. 0 - Automatically approve, 1 - Manually approve, 2 - No registration required.

registration_type.description: Registration type for recurring meetings. 1 - Register once and attend any, 2 - Register for each, 3 - Register once and choose occurrences.

audio.description: Determine how participants can join the meeting audio.

enforce_login.description: Only authenticated users can join the meeting.

enforce_login_domains.description: Only users with specific email domain(s) can join. Comma separated for multiple domains.

alternative_hosts.description: Alternative host email addresses. Comma separated for multiple alternative hosts.

alternative_hosts_email_notification.description: Send email notification to alternative hosts.

global_dial_in_countries.description: List of countries for global dial-in numbers.

authentication_name.description: Authentication name set in the authentication profile.

show_share_button.description: Show social share buttons on the registration page.

allow_multiple_devices.description: Allow attendees to join from multiple devices.

approved_or_denied_countries_or_regions.description: Approve or block users from specific countries.

meeting_invitees.description: List of users invited to the meeting.

email_notification.description: Send email notification when meeting starts.

host_save_video_order.description: Allow host to save the order of gallery view.
